steps.title: Distribute the subtraction
steps.content:
The expression subtracts the entire second parenthesis, so the subtraction changes the sign of each term inside that parenthesis. The term $5c^3$ becomes $-5c^3$, and the term $-4$ becomes $+4$:
$$
(8c+7)-(5c^3-4)=8c+7-5c^3+4
$$

steps.title: Combine like terms
steps.content: Now combine only the constant terms. The terms $8c$ and $-5c^3$ are not like terms because they have different powers of $c$: $$ 7+4=11 $$ So the simplified expression is: $$ -5c^3+8c+11 $$ The answer is D.
